positive: A stylized, symmetrical mandala featuring intertwined celestial elements, such as crescent moons, shooting stars, and stylized constellations. Incorporate deep emerald greens, muted sapphire blues, and accents of distressed metallic gold. The design should have clear, strong black outlines, achieving a sophisticated, etched silhouette effect suitable for screen printing on apparel. Composition must be central and highly detailed, resembling high-end celestial cartography or Art Deco botanical patterns. Minimalist, elegant, mystical, vector illustration style.
